_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI model development processes
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI model lifecycle management, including model versioning, drift detection, performance monitoring, retraining triggers, and decommissioning criteria.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI DG domain. Knowledge DG-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-009 (AG, cosine: 0.614), AG-K-002 (AG, cosine: 0.599).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.634). Shared vocabulary: [ai, knowledge, model]. NICE-only terms [development, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [criteria, decommissioning, detection, drift, lifecycle, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.909 (P=0.942, R=0.878). P exceeds R by 0.064 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.2%, N:61.7%, C:38.1%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of AI model development processes" vs "Knowledge of AI model lifecycle management, including model versioning, drift de" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.694 > STS 0.634 (gap +0.060). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, knowledge, model] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.1%. Shared tokens: [ai, knowledge, model]. NICE-only: [development, processes]. WIDAI-only: [criteria, decommissioning, detection, drift, lifecycle, management].
